topRejectReasons: chunks: negation must be a single chunk — use "did not" not ["did","not"]
fatal: distractor must not appear in answer
fatal: chunks (minus distractor) + prefilled words must equal answer words
distractor:unsafe: "is" directly swaps with "was" in answer (be-verb tense change produces valid sentence)
runtime: question tmp_r1_q5: bank must not contain duplicates

review:blocker:tmp_r1_q1: distractor DIRECTLY replaces one word to form a valid sentence — 'The botanical garden display hundreds of rare tropical plants.' is NOT grammatical, so this is NOT a blocker. [Self-correction: 'display' as base form with 3rd-person singular subject is ungrammatical — NOT a blocker.]

review:blocker:tmp_r1_q4: clearly ambiguous order — 'The hiking trail we explored wound through a beautiful pine forest.' has 'through' as a single-word chunk that could plausibly attach differently; additionally 'a beautiful' as a multi-word chunk is non-standard collocation splitting. Minor, not a true blocker.
